title: oenothera fruticosa var. fraseri
intro: Oenothera fruticosa var. fraseri, also known as the Fraser's Evening Primrose, is a perennial plant species native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, derived from its high content of gamma-linolenic acid (GLA) and other fatty acids. The Fraser's Evening Primrose has been associated with various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving skin conditions, and supporting heart health. Herbal preparations of Oenothera fruticosa var. fraseri can be made into capsules, tinctures, or oils for topical application, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
